seoTitle: Cooya Pooya vs Copley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cooya Pooya and Copley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cooya Pooya vs Copley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cooya Pooya and Copley.
heading: Cooya Pooya vs Copley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cooya Pooya, Western Australia and Copley, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Copley has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Cooya Pooya (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cooya Pooya or Copley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cooya Pooya has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Copley scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cooya Pooya scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Copley scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cooya Pooya or Copley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Copley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
